title: Notification No.116/2015-Cus(NT), dated 24.11.2015
text: [To be published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part-II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii)] Government of India Ministry of Finance Department of Revenue (Central Board of Excise and Customs) Notification No. 116/2015-Customs (N.T.) New Delhi, the 24th November, 2015 S.O. (E). -In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 and sub-section (1) of section 5 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby appoints the Additional Director General (Adjudication), Directorate of Revenue Intelligence, Mumbai to act as a Common Adjudicating Authority to exercise the powers and discharge the duties conferred or imposed on - (i) the Principal Commissioner of Customs (Port), Strand Road, Custom House, Kolkatta-700001; (ii) the Principal Commissioner of Customs, Air Cargo Complex (Import), New Custom House, Near IGI Airport, New Delhi – 110 037; (iii) the Principal Commissioner of Customs (III), Air Cargo Complex (Import), Mumbai Zone III, Air Cargo Complex, Sahar, Andheri (East), Mumbai – 400099; (iv) the Principal Commissioner of Customs (Nhava Sheva-I), Mumbai Zone II, Jawaharlal Nehru Custom House, Nhava Sheva, Taluka Uran, Dist. Raigad, Maharashtra – 400707; (v) the Commissioner of Customs, Inland Container Depot, Patparganj and other Depots, ICD Tughlakabad, New Delhi, for the purpose of adjudicating the matters relating to show cause notice pertaining to M/s.Idea Cellular Ltd., 5th floor, “Windsor”, Off. CST Road, Kalina, Santacruz (East), Mumbai-400098 and others issued vide Show Cause Notice number DRI/MZU/B/ENQ-2(INT-NIL)/2014, dated the 18th December, 2014 by the Additional Director General, Directorate of Revenue Intelligence, Mumbai Zonal Unit, Mumbai. [F No.437/39/2015-Cus.IV] (Z. R. Kamili) Director (Customs) -- 1 of 1 --
